text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates this subchapter in a manner for which a specific penalty is not provided.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $50 and not more than $200.

(c) This section does not apply to a violation of Section 520.006 (Collection of Fees on Behalf of Another Assessor-collector; Compensation of Assessor-collector) or a rule adopted under Section 520.0071 (Deputies) .

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 520.036 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 235, eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.016 — General Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates this subchapter in a manner for which a specific penalty is not provided.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $50 and not more than $200.

(c) This section does not apply to a violation of Section 520.006 (Collection of Fees on Behalf of Another Assessor-collector; Compensation of Assessor-collector) or a rule adopted under Section 520.0071 (Deputies) .

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 520.036 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 235, eff. January 1, 2012.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 46, eff. September 1, 2013.*
